name: Omni Health, Inc.
summary: Omni Health, Inc., through its subsidiary, Malecon Pharmacy, Inc., operates a pharmacy in Hialeah, Florida. It provides health, wellness, and pharmacy services; and manufactures, sells, and distributes anti-aging cream. The company is headquartered in Hialeah, Florida. Omni Health, Inc. is a subsidiary of LX Retail Group, Inc.
